calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One); And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Paul DeAngelis, Law Office of, (415) 7811-0260, for Plaintiff.
Davis J. Reilly, Esq., BLEDSOE, DIESTEL, TREPPA & CRANE LLP, (415) 981-5411, for Defendants.

RE: PLAINTIFF JOHN MENDOZA's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One); And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the Clerk to sign the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Counsel report on the results of their meet and confer discussions and identify remaining areas of disagreement. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court confirms its tentative ruling. No objection to the preceding is presented. The court instructs Mr. Reilly to submit a proposed order approved as to form to khuibonhoa@duanemorris.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
